prompt: Create a cinematic close-up still life of a translucent 35mm film strip floating in a graceful horizontal arc across a dark vintage projection room. The film strip is warm amber-brown with glossy reflections, burnt golden edges, and exactly 3 large visible image frames: left frame shows a steampunk industrial city with brass gears, smokestacks, steam clouds, and ornate machinery; center frame shows a formal early-20th-century man in a suit and bow tie with the face deliberately covered by a plain solid brown rectangular censor block; right frame shows a large retro airship or zeppelin flying above a small suspended platform in a glowing sky. Include two continuous rows of small rectangular sprocket holes along the top and bottom of the film strip, evenly spaced and lit from within by amber highlights. In the blurred background, place one large dark vintage movie camera/projector silhouette on the left, out of focus. Add dramatic white-gold spotlight beams descending from the upper center, floating dust particles, shallow depth of field, warm sepia color grading, volumetric light, high contrast, photorealistic detail, and a nostalgic short-film atmosphere. Use 3:2 landscape. No captions, no logos, no extra text.
